name: Benishangul-Gumuz Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: shared with the Ethiopian national flag — peace and prosperity
shared with the Ethiopian national flag — fertility and the land
the hoist triangle — the courage and sacrifice of the region's peoples

description: Three horizontal stripes of yellow, black, and green from top to bottom, with a red triangle issuing from the hoist.
history: The Benishangul-Gumuz Region is one of the regional states of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, established under the 1995 Constitution. The flag combines the colours of the Ethiopian national flag with a hoist triangle.
